The '''Delephrans''' were a socio-cultural group<ref name="Journal3" /> that originated in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Delephr system/Legends|Delephr system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Carrion sector/Legends|Carrion sector]].<ref name="TEA" /> They maintained the [[Delephran militia]] and engaged in commerce shipping that was preyed on for several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] based in the [[Vexta Belt]]<ref name="Journal3" /> of the [[Vexta system/Legends|Vexta system]].<ref name="TEA" /> Eventually, at some point no later than [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="1 BBY">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which is set during [[Andrephan Stormcaller]]'s service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. In addition, {{JournalCite|3|Blasters for Hire}} establishes that Stormcaller served with the [[Delephran militia]] no less than three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before joining the Alliance.</ref> the Delephran [[Militia/Legends|militia]] commissioned the decorated [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] [[Andrephan Stormcaller]] to train its [[Commander/Legends|commanders]], leading to Stormcaller heading the operation known as the [[Piracy Scouring]] against the Vexta Belt pirates.<ref name="Journal3" />

At some point after the [[Declaration of a New Order|establishment]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="Journal3" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] absorbed the Delephran forces, with all personnel of the latter facing mandatory service in the former and Stormcaller going to serve at the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]].<ref name="Journal3" /> The Delephr [[Star system/Legends|system]] fell within the borders of the Empire's [[Pentastar Alignment]] splinter faction between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and was a part of the [[Imperial Remnant]] between [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] and [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Delephrans were introduced in "[[Blasters for Hire]]," a ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' source article written by [[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]] and published in the [[August]] [[1994]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|third issue]] of [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Journal3" />
